overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy futuristic cyberpunk city street. The player walks along wet sidewalks past parked vehicles and construction barriers, then crosses a busy intersection with other pedestrians. High-quality game engine rendering with atmospheric rain effects and neon signage.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past parked vehicles and construction barriers

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk in a futuristic city, passing construction barriers and a parked green armored vehicle. Overhead pedestrian bridges span the street while digital billboards display advertisements on the surrounding glass towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with public seating and vegetation planters

events.description: passing from construction zone to landscaped sidewalk area with benches and planters

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past concrete stairs and public benches

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to building entrance
orange and gray benches lined along the building wall
large rectangular planters containing spiky palm-like vegetation

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk transitions to a landscaped area with concrete stairs, public benches, and planters with palm trees. The camera continues walking past a digital advertising kiosk while approaching a major intersection with a crosswalk visible ahead.

events.description: steps onto the yellow striped crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
crossing the street with the walk signal while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at the crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in green coat walking ahead across the crosswalk

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and WALK text painted on ground
raised median strip with palm trees and plants dividing the road

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the wide yellow-striped crosswalk and crosses the multi-lane street with other pedestrians. The scene opens up to show the full intersection with vehicles waiting at the lights, while futuristic buildings with large digital billboards surround the crossing area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rain-slicked futuristic sidewalk that gradually opens into a bustling city intersection. It begins by moving past construction barriers and a parked green armored vehicle, with the camera gliding under overhead pedestrian bridges beneath the glow of digital billboards on glass towers. As the path evolves, the industrial surroundings transition into a landscaped area featuring concrete stairs, public benches, and planters with palm trees. The camera then passes a digital advertising kiosk before shifting toward a wide, yellow-striped crosswalk. Finally, the scene expands as the camera enters the intersection, crossing the multi-lane street alongside other pedestrians while surrounded by towering buildings and waiting vehicles.
